title: Roosters qol/pvp pack
description: The all in one pvp/QOL pack! Improves performance, adds QoL features, and has many things to make your PvP experience better. FPS may even increase by 100 in some situations
body:
# **The official modrinth version!!**


**This resource pack may not be updated as frequently anymore. I feel I have literally done everything I can with a resource pack. Please feel free to give suggestions, or check out my [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/members/Ash_Art02/projects)/Modrinth profile for other projects**


**Supported versions:
1.20.2   1.20.3   1.20.4   1.20.5   1.20.6   1.21   1.21.1   1.21.2   1.21.3   1.21.4   1.21.5   1.21.6   1.21.7   1.21.8   1.21.9   1.21.10   1.21.11   26.1   26.1.1**

Available on both CurseForge and Modrinth, thanks to/for the support!!

Find any problems or have any suggestions? Comment or join the Discord server, and I will do my best to fix it or add on to the pack! The issue tracker for this pack is now on GitHub! Though if you want, Discord is still a great place to go if you have questions, problems, etc. 

I try to give a decent-sized update to this pack every week! "If an update doesn't come on any Monday, I may just be thinking of things to add, so still expect an update soon after that."

"WANNA MAKE YOUR OWN FORK OF THIS? READ ME: **Ask me for permission** in the Discord if you want to make a fork of this or use some of the textures/code."


DON'T LIKE THE BLUE ASTHETIC?: Search "Roosters subfile/dark mode" in CurseForge for the official "fix" for it!! "or just get the popular dark mode :3." (Edit, use of the subfile is NOT recommended anymore, instead look for one of the "Sprightly" texture packs, they are of higher quality and will receave better updates, support, and attention.) You can find the Sprightly packs on my accounts, and on both CurseForge and Modrinth.


**The changes made by this pack are in the spoiler below 
                                                     V**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>


• Visual Improvements
Smaller items, tools, buckets, weapons, tridents, and edible items
Shortened grass (multiple passes)
Softer/cleaner sun texture
Clear water
Simplified/optimized crystals, blocks, sand outline, end sky, and other textures
Hearts are easier to read when withered
Highlighted ores
Ancient debris turned blue
Tripwire and webs made more visible
Smaller fireworks and sparks
No pumpkin blur
Strider's face changed (neko face)
Freeze overlay reduced
Nausea blur removed
Darker netherite armor
“King” netherite armor
Updated armor trims
Enchant glint changed to reddish-pink
Pink color shift on items (golden apple, ender pearl, elytra, etc.)
The golden helmet looks more like a crown
Bucket saturation fixed
Simple wool
The weather is clearer
Blue totem "pink was too harsh."
Netherite tools are now more stylized
Diamond helmet texture upgraded
Diamond tool/item textures upgraded
Iron tool textures upgraded
Stone tool textures upgraded
Wood tool textures upgraded
leather armor upgraded
Chainmail armor upgraded
Gold armor upgraded
Iron armor upgraded

• Interface & GUI
Smaller crosshair
Blue/pastel GUI theme
Softer pastel highlights
300+ splashes added, later removed
Multiple GUI/inventory glitches fixed
More menus recolored blue
HUD sprites fully revamped twice (hearts, armor, food, etc.)
Some effect icons have improved
Hotbar upgraded
Guis/menus upgraded 

• Combat & Gameplay Readability
Bow charge indicator added, fixed, then improved
Crossbow charge indicator added
Crit-timing helper
Low fire, low tools, low shields, low trident
Simplified projectiles; red tracking accents added
Reduced rain/snow clutter
Clearer wither hearts
Red destroy-stage cracks
Explosion particles removed
Reduced totem pop particles
Easier-to-see tripwire and webs
Netherite is blue for easier finding
Wind burst particles are less obstructive + added red highlight
Darker netherite tools
Diamond tools changed

• Performance Optimizations
Block and item texture optimizations
Crystal optimizations
End portal starfield optimized
Enchantment glow fixed and smoothed
Smaller dropped-item shadows, then fixed
XP orbs halved in resolution
Lower-resolution end sky
World border animation fixed
Multiple heavy textures removed
Freeze, nausea, glint, and explosion overlays/particles optimized
Removed heavy/unused textures for faster loading
70% less clouds



• Bug Fixes & Clean-ups
Bow charge indicator fixed
Crystal bugs fixed
bedrock visual glitch has been fixed
Gravel glitch fixed
Sand outline continuity fixed
End crystal glass fixed
Inventory visual glitch fixed
Bucket saturation corrected
Golden apple outline fixed
Many other fixes are made constantly as well :3


</details>




"P.S., if you want the GUI etc to be exactly as shown, turn your GUI scale down to 2; the pictures shown may not be up to date or visually correct all of the time."
